[Scene] A modern bar.

[Characters] Female: Dressed in a fashionable evening dress. Male: Dressed in elegant party club wear—with a sleek fitted shirt and blazer.

Shot 1 (Medium Shot, 4s): The female character looking at the male with gentle eyes speaks: "Wine in a club? You're full of surprises."

Shot 2 (Close-up, 3s): The camera pushes in to focus on the male characters face. With confident smirk, leans in slightly to reply: "Only the good kind. Like you."

Shot 3 (Medium Shot, 5s): The female character looks at the male and replies coyly: "Flatterer! What's your next trick?"

nodes.title: Note:
widgets_values:
### Prompting Guide

1. Writing Logic: Prompts should include a complete Scene Description + Character Settings + Storyboard Design + Camera Language to reinforce dialogue logic.

2. Trigger Words: No specific trigger word required.

3. Reference Example (Ancient Chinese Fantasy):

- [Scene] Ancient Chinese fantasy, celestial realm above clouds, pink and purple sunset glow blending with rolling clouds, warm golden sunlight piercing through, ethereal and dreamy atmosphere.

- [Characters] Female: Classical bun hairstyle, silver floral hairpins, wearing a sky-blue translucent flowing gown with gold lotus patterns, holding a glazed jade bottle. Male: Black hair tied up with a silver crown, wearing a moon-white wide-sleeved immortal robe with silver cloud embroidery, holding a white jade whisk.

- Shot 1 (Wide Shot, 3s): Overhead view. Two immortals stand side by side above the clouds, robes fluttering in the mist, showing the vastness of the celestial realm.

- Shot 2 (Medium Shot, 4s): Camera slowly pushes in. The female character turns slightly, looking at the male with gentle eyes, whispering: "The spring floods in the mortal world have subsided; this celestial water can restore life to the land."

- Shot 3 (Side Medium-Close Shot, 3s): The male character looks at the bottle in her hand, replying warmly: "Thank you for your kindness. With this blessing, the mortal world will surely flourish."

- Shot 4 (Close-up, 2s): Focus on the glazed jade bottle. The body is translucent like ice, with light reflecting off the water inside and the golden lotus patterns on the dress flickering in the background.

- Shot 5 (Wide Shot, 4s): Camera pulls back. The two figures gradually merge into the sunset glow and clouds, eventually turning into a streak of light in the sky.

inputs.text: A medium close-up shot features a Caucasian man with a closely shaven head and face, wearing a black baseball cap with "PNTR" in white letters on the front, and a dark grey t-shirt with "JUST DO IT" visible across his chest. A small black microphone is clipped to his shirt collar. He is positioned slightly to the left of the frame, looking intently downwards and to his right, his eyes focused off-camera. His facial expression is one of deep concentration, with his brow slightly furrowed. As he looks down, a quick sniff sound is heard, and then he speaks with a deep male voice and a slightly frustrated tone, saying, "I think it's so bad." The camera remains static throughout, maintaining a shallow depth of field, which keeps the man in sharp focus while the background is softly blurred, revealing a light-colored wall with white wooden shelving or trim, and a partially open white wooden door on the right. After a brief pause, another short, audible sniff is heard. The man then continues to speak, his voice maintaining the same quality, as he states, "So bad. So bad." He elaborates further, emphasizing his point with a final statement, "This got to be, it's got to be the worst tool I've ever seen."
